# Maps instrumentation directory prefixes to smoke test suites.
# Format: <instrumentation-prefix> <suite1,suite2,...>
#
# When a changed instrumentation matches a prefix, the listed suites run.
# If no prefix matches, no suites run (the instrumentation isn't exercised by smoke tests).
# Lines starting with # are comments.

servlet/ jetty,liberty,payara,tomcat,tomee,websphere,wildfly
jetty/ jetty
tomcat/ tomcat,tomee
liberty/ liberty
payara/ payara
websphere/ websphere
wildfly/ wildfly
grizzly- jetty
spring/ other
grpc- other
play- other
quarkus- other
instrumentation-annotations/ other
